blockingPolicy.mustPass: All required V45 acceptance IDs must pass before tagging unless explicitly waived in the v4.5.0 review checklist.
blockingPolicy.manualEvidenceAllowed: Manual evidence is allowed only for environment-dependent native renderer disclosure and post-tag release asset checks.
blockingPolicy.knownLimitationRule: Known limitations must be visible in structured CLI output and mapped to a v5 roadmap item.

acceptanceIds.title: Command metadata, help, capabilities, and dispatch agree
MCP is excluded from default/substrate runnable capability
Agent capabilities provide compact summary and limitations
OOXML ZIP metadata is checked before XML parse
Inspect smoke covers PPTX, DOCX, XLSX, and PDF
Render smoke creates Office, PDF, chart SVG, and diagram SVG artifacts
Supported edits prove dry-run, output, and package diff evidence
View smoke writes preview artifacts and metadata
Verify smoke reports portable readiness without implying native proof
Diff smoke reports semantic/package changes truthfully
Manifest smoke records artifacts, hashes, warnings, and replay hints
Version surfaces are synchronized by version scripts and checked
